title: 185 Mathematics 6.   Trace Fig.1 on a tracing paper and colour the angles of the figure in
subject: Mathematics
unit: Unit L - cardboard as shown in Fig
activityTitle: 185 Mathematics 6.   Trace Fig.1 on a tracing paper and colour the angles of the figure in
objective: To find the order of rotational symmetry of a given figure
materials:
White sheets of paper, geometry box, tracing paper,
sketch pen, pencil, adhesive, scissors, board pins.
procedure:
1.   Let the given figure be of the shape as shown in Fig. 1.
2.   Make two copies of the given figure and join the diagonals of the
central square in each of the figures. Mark the point of intersection of
diagonals as O (Fig. 2). For identification, mark a point P as shown in
Fig. 2.
Fig. 1   Fig. 2
observation:
On actual measurement
∠ APC = ________,   ∠ BPD = ________.
∠ BPC = ________,   ∠ APD = ________.
∠ APC =   ∠   _______.
∠   _______ =   ∠ APD.
So, vertically opposite angles are ________.
discussion:
This activity can be used to explain the meaning of vertically opposite angles.
The result is useful in solving many geometrical problems.
186 Laboratory Manual – Elementary Stage
